# Mental Models — Selection Index

> Scan this index to identify 2-3 candidate models for the user's challenge.
> Then load the full model file (`m{NN}_{name}.md`) for each candidate before proceeding.
> Full index with situation-based selection guide: `_library/mental-models/_index.md`

---

## By Domain Group

**General Thinking (01–09, 99)**
First principles, inversion, second-order thinking, probabilistic reasoning, thought experiments, Hanlon's/Occam's razor, circle of competence, map/territory.

**Systems & Science (10–40)**
Activation energy, feedback loops, bottlenecks, leverage, inertia, ecosystems, emergence, margin of safety, critical mass, law of diminishing returns, incentives.

**Mathematics & Statistics (41–47)**
Sampling, randomness, regression to the mean, multiply by zero, global/local maxima, surface area.

**Economics & Markets (48–59)**
Scarcity, supply/demand, optimization, trade-offs, creative destruction, Gresham's law, debt, monopoly/competition.

**Military & Strategy (71–75)**
Asymmetric warfare, two-front war, counterinsurgency, mutually assured destruction, seeing the front.

**Narrative & Communication (60–70)**
Framing, contrast, narrative instinct, audience, genre, character, plot, performance.

**Human Psychology & Bias (76–98)**
Incentive bias, Pavlovian association, availability heuristic, social proof, confirmation bias, survivorship bias, hindsight bias, first-conclusion bias, commitment bias.

---

## Quick Situation Triggers

| If the challenge involves...                 | Consider models... |
| -------------------------------------------- | ------------------ |
| Plan feels solid but something's off         | 01, 05, 07, 98, 88 |
| High-stakes decision, incomplete info        | 02, 06, 34, 08, 09 |
| Every solution is a variant of what's broken | 03, 32, 47, 39     |
| System slowing down / becoming chaotic       | 30, 14, 20, 38, 19 |
| People not behaving as expected              | 19, 77, 78, 84, 76 |
| Need to stress-test before committing        | 07, 34, 05, 77, 96 |
| Project lost momentum                        | 10, 20, 17, 12, 35 |
| Growth stalling despite investment           | 40, 37, 33, 21, 32 |
| Post-mortem on a bad decision                | 96, 92, 82, 94, 01 |
